title: ceropegia macrantha var. thorelii
intro: Ceropegia macrantha var. thorelii, also known as the 'Thorelii Ceropegia', is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed vine family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Ceropegia macrantha var. thorelii is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to treat various health conditions.
